title: PeopleOps compensation audit
summary: Run a local compensation parity analysis over approved HR data, ask one or two clarifying questions if needed, and stage a privacy-safe summary for review before it leaves the device.

requestedCapabilities.reason: The receiver may need to clarify which compensation columns or comparison groups are safe to use.
The request expects one approved HR CSV export.
The receiver may prefer a Parquet export instead of CSV.
The final summary should be staged for receiver approval and then saved locally.

questions.title: Compensation field
questions.prompt: Which numeric field should represent total compensation if more than one amount column exists?

outputContract.description: A privacy-safe JSON summary of pay distribution by department, level, and location, including any observed gaps and caveats.
